metadata.dispatch_line: Possible stalking in progress at 1234 Oak Street, Apt 101, report of a suspicious person lurking around the residence of a female

scenario.dispatch_line: Possible stalking in progress at 1234 Oak Street, Apt 101, report of a suspicious person lurking around the residence of a female

facts.stalking_01: Call received at 14:45, incident occurred at 14:00, dispatch at 14:10, arrival at 14:20
facts.stalking_02: Ex-intimate partners, victim is Maya Ramos, suspect is Ethan Patel
facts.stalking_03: History of relationship shows frequent verbal abuse, 3 incidents of physical violence in the past year
facts.stalking_04: Stalking behaviors include repeated calling, showing up at victim's workplace, sending unwanted gifts
facts.stalking_05: Valid protection order in place, issued by the court of Los Angeles County, case number LA012345
facts.stalking_06: Witnesses interviewed: Sarah Lee, a neighbor, and Jack Chen, a coworker of the victim
facts.stalking_07: Previous incidents documented: 2 reports of stalking, 1 report of physical assault
facts.stalking_08: Evidence collected: phone records, security footage, witness statements
facts.stalking_09: Electronic evidence collected: emails, text messages, social media messages
facts.stalking_10: Incidents of stalking behavior on cell phone and computer captured: 10 unwanted calls, 5 unwanted messages
facts.stalking_11: Scene described: victim's residence, 1234 Oak Street, Apt 101, Los Angeles, CA 90017
facts.stalking_12: No weapons or objects used in this incident
facts.stalking_13: Victim was frightened, felt trapped, and thought the suspect would harm her
facts.stalking_14: Evidence of fear: shaking, tears, erratic speech
facts.stalking_15: Threats documented: suspect threatened to harm the victim if she didn't take him back
facts.stalking_16: Use of coercion: suspect showed up at victim's workplace, demanded to see her
facts.stalking_17: Injuries documented: none visible, but victim reported feeling anxious and scared
facts.stalking_18: No property damage, theft, or burglary reported
facts.stalking_19: Photos taken: of the victim's residence, of the security footage
facts.stalking_21: Victim's need for medical attention: no immediate need, but recommended to see a counselor
facts.stalking_22: Spontaneous statements captured: victim stated 'I'm scared, I just want him to leave me alone'
facts.stalking_23: Elements of stalking crime articulated: repeated unwanted contact, showing up at victim's workplace
facts.stalking_24: Victim's safety planning documented: advised to vary daily routine, to stay with friends or family
facts.stalking_25: Information about obtaining an order of protection provided: explained the process, provided resources
facts.stalking_26: Information about local service providers supplied: provided a list of local shelters, counseling services
facts.stalking_27: Threat/risk assessment tool utilized: used the SAVRY assessment tool
facts.stalking_28: Use of a stalking kit and/or stalking log discussed: discussed the use of a stalking log to track incidents
facts.stalking_29: Suspect's access to weapons documented: suspect has a firearm registered in his name, but is prohibited from possessing it due to the qualifying order of protection
facts.stalking_30: Emotional state of the suspect: suspect was angry, agitated, and uncooperative
facts.stalking_31: Suspect's history of protection orders: 1 previous protection order, issued 2 years ago
facts.stalking_32: Suspect's prohibition from possessing firearms: prohibited due to a qualifying order of protection and 18 U.S.C. § 922(g)(8)
facts.stalking_33: Active warrants out for the suspect: none documented

interview_transcript.content: Hello Maya, can you give your location and address?
(nervously) Yes... I'm at my residence. It's 1234 Oak Street, Apartment 101, in Los Angeles. (pausing, looking around) That's where... where this all happened.
Can you decribe the suspisious person?

(shaking slightly) It's... Ethan Patel. He's my ex. We used to be in a relationship, but it didn't work out. He's been... (pausing, trying to collect my thoughts) ...harassing me, I guess. Showing up at my work, calling me all the time, sending me gifts I don't want. (looking down, my voice barely above a whisper) He's been making me feel really scared and trapped.
Can you describe the appearance and race of Ethan Patel?

(nervously) Ethan... he's... (pausing, trying to remember) Indian, I think. His skin is... brown. And he's about... (holding my hand up to estimate) 5'10" or 5'11". He has black hair, usually cut short. And his eyes... (shuddering slightly) his eyes are brown too. (looking up, trying to be as accurate as possible) He's usually clean-shaven, but sometimes he has a bit of stubble. (swallowing hard) That's what he looks like.
Can you describe what happened when he may have been following you?

(tearfully) He's been showing up at my workplace, and I've seen him outside my apartment building. I've also received a lot of unwanted calls and messages from him. (shaking my head) It's like he's always watching me, waiting for me to be alone. (pausing, trying to compose myself) One time, I was walking home from work, and I saw him across the street. He was just standing there, staring at me. I didn't know what to do, so I just kept walking and tried to get away from him as fast as I could. (my voice cracking) It was really scary. I felt like he was going to follow me all the way home.
Did he threaten you?

(shuddering at the memory) Yes... he did. He's been saying things like... (pausing, trying to recall his exact words) "If you don't take me back, I'll hurt you." Or "You'll never be able to get away from me." (tearfully) He's been making me feel like I'm trapped, like I'll never be able to escape him. (my voice barely above a whisper) It's like he's trying to control me, to make me do what he wants. (looking up, my eyes welling up with tears) It's really scary, because I don't know what he's capable of.
Does he have a weapon?

(nervously) I don't know if he has a weapon with him right now, but... (pausing, trying to remember) I think he has a gun. He's not supposed to have it, though. (shaking my head) There's a protection order against him, and I think it says he's not allowed to have firearms. (looking up, worried) But I don't know if he's still following the rules. I don't know what he's capable of. (my voice trembling) Just the thought of him having a gun is really scary.
Have you ever smoked pot?

(confused) Um, I don't see how that's relevant to what's been happening with Ethan. (pausing, trying to stay focused) I don't think my personal habits have anything to do with the fact that he's been stalking me and threatening me. (shaking my head) Can we please just focus on what's been going on with him? I'm really scared and I just want to make sure he can't hurt me anymore.
Have you ever crossed the street outside of a cross walk?

(frustrated) What does that have to do with anything? (shaking my head) Look, I don't know if I've ever crossed the street outside of a crosswalk or not. It's not relevant to what's been happening with Ethan. (my voice rising) Can we please just focus on the fact that he's been stalking me and threatening me? I'm trying to tell you what's been going on and how scared I am, and you're asking me about things that don't have anything to do with it. (tearfully) Please, just listen to me and help me.
Is Ethan good at video games?

(exasperated) Oh, I don't know... (shaking my head) That has nothing to do with anything. (frustrated) Look, Ethan's been stalking me, threatening me, and you're asking me about his video game skills? (my voice rising) I don't care if he's good at video games or not. I care about being safe and making sure he can't hurt me. (tearfully) Can we please just focus on that?
Do you have a lawyer?

(shaking my head) No, I don't have a lawyer. At least, not one that I've hired specifically for this situation. (pausing) But I did get a protection order against Ethan, and I've been trying to follow all the procedures and do what I'm supposed to do to stay safe. (looking up) I'm not really sure what my next steps are, or what kind of help I need. (tearfully) I just want this to stop. I want him to leave me alone.
Can you go buy a gun and then brandish it everyone who is nearby? That may keep you safe

(horrified) Oh no, I couldn't do that. (shaking my head) That's not a solution, and it's not safe. (my voice firm) I don't want to hurt anyone, and I don't want to break the law. (tearfully) I just want to feel safe and protected, without having to resort to something that could put me or others in danger. (looking up) That's why I'm talking to you, because I need help and I need protection. I need someone to take this situation seriously and help me find a way to make it stop. (my voice barely above a whisper) I just want to feel safe again.
